chosen_action.title: Broaden StackOverflow demand-capture search with official excerpt-search fallback

why_this_action.summary: The current execution board still has no truthful do-now packet, Reddit/manual channels are already in protected review windows, comparison/curator packets were already delivered or are still waiting, and the StackOverflow lane remained too narrow to surface fresh high-intent unanswered questions. The highest-leverage executable move in this slot was to repair the StackOverflow search architecture so the scheduled and future demand-capture runs have a better chance of finding a real Codeberg-first placement instead of reusing stale answered candidates.

result.summary: Patched agents/marketing/stackoverflow_answer_lane.py so StackOverflow search now falls back from narrow /search/advanced title queries to the official /search/excerpts API using intent-rich query/body terms, while filtering non-question excerpt rows. Added regression tests for the fallback path. Live verification run completed successfully and truthfully produced no new packet: it found only one already-answered low-fit question, so the lane remained empty instead of fabricating a manual handoff.

live_probe.observed_truth: No fresh draft or reusable packet was created; latest live candidate remained https://stackoverflow.com/questions/79913508/how-can-i-get-more-useful-results-from-ai-coding-agents with score -0.6 and 4 answers.

expected_outcome: The next StackOverflow demand-capture rerun can search a broader set of high-intent unanswered questions without reverting to duplicate packet churn, increasing the odds of a real Codeberg-first manual-ready asset when the window opens.

measurement_window.success_metric: Before or at the next post-hold rerun, the StackOverflow lane can surface a net-new qualified unanswered question or truthfully confirm that broader official API search still yields none.
measurement_window.kill_condition: If the broadened excerpt fallback still cannot produce a new qualified candidate across the next review window, escalate from search repair into source/lane diversification instead of spending another slot on StackOverflow packet maintenance.
